name: Chocolate Caramel Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Melt caramels with 1/3 cup evaporated milk in the top of a double boiler. Cook, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In a bowl, blend cake mix, remaining 1/3 cup evaporated milk, and softened butter until dough holds together. Stir in chopped pecans.
4. Press half of the cake mixture into a greased 9 by 13 inch pan.
5. Bake for 6-8 minutes.
6. Sprinkle semisweet chocolate chips on top.
7. Pour melted caramel mixture over everything, spreading evenly.
8. Crumble remaining cake mixture over the caramel.
9. Bake for an additional 15-25 minutes until the center is soft. Let cool for 30 minutes before cutting into squares.
